question: Race conditions(Time of check/time of use)
canonical_answer: An undesirable situation that occurs when a device or system attempts to perform two or more operations at the same time

appears_in.title: Comptia Exam Objectives Security+
appears_in.answer: when a software program depends on the timing of one or more processes to function correctly

appears_in.title: Comptia Sec Plus Objectives
